# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "location": "East US"
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('nsgName'), '/RDPRule')]",
      "properties": {
        "description": "Allow inbound traffic on port 3389 (RDP)",
        "protocol": "Tcp",
        "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0",
        "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
        "destinationPortRange": "3389",
        "priority": 100,
        "access": "Allow"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('nsgName'), '/SSHRule')]",
      "properties": {
        "description": "Allow inbound traffic on port 22 (SSH)",
        "protocol": "Tcp",
        "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0",
        "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
        "destinationPortRange": "22",
        "priority": 110,
        "access": "Allow"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('nsgName'), '/HTTPRule')]",
      "properties": {
        "description": "Allow inbound traffic on port 80 (HTTP)",
        "protocol": "Tcp",
        "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0",
        "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
        "destinationPortRange": "80",
        "priority": 120,
        "access": "Allow"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('nsgName'), '/HTTPSRule')]",
      "properties": {
        "description": "Allow inbound traffic on port 443 (HTTPS)",
        "protocol": "Tcp",
        "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0",
        "destinationAddressPrefix": "VirtualNetwork",
        "destinationPortRange": "443",
        "priority": 130,
        "access": "Allow"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "nsgId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
    }
